episodes.name: The Heirs of the Dragon
episodes.overview: Viserys hosts a tournament to celebrate the birth of his second child. Rhaenyra welcomes her uncle Daemon back to the Red Keep.

episodes.name: The Rogue Prince
episodes.overview: Rhaenyra oversteps at the Small Council. Viserys is urged to secure the succession through marriage.

episodes.name: The Black Queen
episodes.overview: While mourning a tragic loss, Rhaenyra tries to hold the realm together, and Daemon prepares for war.

name: Season 1
overview: Set nearly 200 years before Game of Thrones, King Viserys I Targaryen names his daughter, Princess Rhaenyra, as heir to the Iron Throne, breaking tradition and igniting tensions within the realm.
